Start by going through the markdown file and extracting all requirements:\r\n   - object model constraints (at least 7 classes, 4 of them more complex)\r\n   - use of enums and DateTime\r\n   - relationships (1-N and N-N)\r\n   - LINQ usage\r\n   - async/await concepts\r\n\r\n2. If anything is unclear, ask before continuing.\r\n\r\n3. Design the object model first:\r\n   - list all classes with their properties\r\n   - define relationships between them\r\n   - clearly identify which classes are GÇŁcomplexGÇĄ (more than 5 properties)\r\n\r\n4. Then set up the project structure:\r\n   - solution\r\n   - separate projects (e.g. Model + Console/App)\r\n   - basic folder organization\r\n\r\n5. Only after that, start implementing the code in logical steps.\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Project idea (API Tester)\r\n\r\nBuild something like a simplified Postman.\r\n\r\nCore functionality should include:\r\n- defining API requests\r\n- grouping requests into collections\r\n- each request should have:\r\n  - URL\r\n  - HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE Gďż˝ďż˝ use enum)\r\n  - headers\r\n  - body\r\n  - creation date (DateTime)\r\n- ability to execute requests asynchronously\r\n- storing responses and linking them to requests\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Object model requirements\r\n\r\n- Minimum 7 classes\r\n- At least 4 classes with 5+ properties\r\n\r\nYou can use something like:\r\n- User\r\n- Workspace\r\n- Collection\r\n- Request\r\n- Response\r\n- Header\r\n- Environment\r\n- Variable\r\n\r\nFeel free to improve the design if needed.\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Relationships\r\n\r\nMake sure to include:\r\n- 1-N relationships (e.g. Collection Gďż˝ďż˝ Requests)\r\n- N-N relationships (e.g. Requests Gďż˝ďż˝ Environments or Tags)\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## What the program should do\r\n\r\n### Data setup (Main method)\r\n- Create at least 3 main objects (e.g. 3 collections)\r\n- Each should contain nested data (requests, responses, etc.)\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### LINQ (important part)\r\n\r\nWrite meaningful queries, for example:\r\n- all GET requests\r\n- latest executed request\r\n- number of requests per collection\r\n- failed responses\r\n- sorting by date\r\n\r\nKeep them realistic and explain briefly what each does.\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### Async / Await\r\n\r\nSimulate request execution:\r\n- create an async method like ExecuteRequestAsync()\r\n- use Task and await Task.Delay(...) to simulate a real API call\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Code quality expectations\r\n\r\n- use properties (no public fields)\r\n- use constructors where it makes sense\r\n- initialize collections properly\r\n- use clear naming\r\n- follow standard C# conventions\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Additional things to include\r\n\r\n- at least one custom enum\r\n- proper use of DateTime\r\n- non-trivial LINQ queries\r\n- structure the code so it could be extended later\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## What to output\r\n\r\n1. Short explanation of the object model\r\n2. All class definitions (Model project)\r\n3. Main program:\r\n   - data initialization\r\n   - LINQ queries\r\n   - async execution\r\n4. Brief explanations where needed\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Avoid\r\n\r\n- skipping the design phase\r\n- dumping everything in one block\r\n- ignoring relationships\r\n- placeholder or unfinished code\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## Goal\r\n\r\nThe final result should look like a clean, well-structured student project that clearly demonstrates understanding of:\r\n- C# OOP\r\n- LINQ\r\n- async/await","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Home\\Projects\\API-tester"}

[2026-04-02T16:49:55.8013521+02:00] preToolUse {"timestamp":"2026-04-02T14:49:54.009Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"4faf321e-ec3e-452d-b226-9c5ead226424","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Home\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\2ee4323d89f28a8a25a6d7d51bb12bc7\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\4faf321e-ec3e-452d-b226-9c5ead226424.jsonl","tool_name":"apply_patch","tool_input":{"explanation":"Add async request executor to simulate API call execution using await Task.Delay.","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: c:\\Users\\Home\\Projects\\API-tester\\Models\\ApiRequestExecutor.cs\n+using API_tester.Models.Enums;\n+\n+namespace API_tester.Models;\n+\n+public class ApiRequestExecutor\n+{\n+    private readonly Random _random = new();\n+\n+    public async Task<ApiResponse> ExecuteRequestAsync(ApiRequest request)\n+    {\n+        var delay = _random.Next(120, 550);\n+        await Task.Delay(delay);\n+\n+        var statusCode = request.Method == HttpMethodType.Get\n+            ? 200\n+            : _random.Next(0, 10) < 8 ? 200 : 500;\n+\n+        var response = new ApiResponse\n+        {\n+            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),\n+            RequestId = request.Id,\n+            Request = request,\n+            StatusCode = statusCode,\n+            IsSuccess = statusCode is >= 200 and < 300,\n+            ReceivedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,\n+            DurationMs = delay,\n+            PayloadSizeBytes = _random.Next(120, 1500),\n+            ResponseBody = statusCode >= 400\n+                ? \"{\\\"error\\\":\\\"Simulated failure\\\"}\"\n+                : \"{\\\"result\\\":\\\"Simulated success\\\"}\"\n+        };\n+\n+        request.LastExecutedAt = response.ReceivedAt;\n+        request.Responses.Add(response);\n+\n+        return response;\n+    }\n+}\n*** End Patch"},"tool_use_id":"call_LXfdnnArVw2t4Fhm2zCbyOQ8__vscode-1775140531132","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Home\\Projects\\API-tester"}

\"{controller=Home}/{action=Index}/{id?}\");\n-\n-app.Run();\n+using API_tester.Models;\n+using API_tester.Models.Enums;\n+\n+if (args.Contains(\"--web\", StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))\n+{\n+    var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);\n+\n+    builder.Services.AddControllersWithViews();\n+\n+    var app = builder.Build();\n+\n+    if (!app.Environment.IsDevelopment())\n+    {\n+        app.UseExceptionHandler(\"/Home/Error\");\n+        app.UseHsts();\n+    }\n+\n+    app.UseHttpsRedirection();\n+    app.UseStaticFiles();\n+    app.UseRouting();\n+    app.UseAuthorization();\n+\n+    app.MapControllerRoute(\n+        name: \"default\",\n+        pattern: \"{controller=Home}/{action=Index}/{id?}\");\n+\n+    app.Run();\n+    return;\n+}\n+\n+await RunLabDemoAsync();\n+\n+static async Task RunLabDemoAsync()\n+{\n+    var owner = new User\n+    {\n+        Id = Guid.NewGuid(),\n+        Username = \"ana.dev\",\n+        Email = \"ana@apitester.dev\",\n+        Role = \"Owner\",\n+        IsActive = true,\n+        CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddMonths(-2)\n+    };\n+\n+    var workspace = new ApiWorkspace\n+    {\n+ OwnerUserId = owner.Id,\n+        OwnerUser = owner\n+    };\n+\n+    var devEnv = new ApiEnvironment\n+    {\n+        Id = Guid.NewGuid(),\n+        Name = \"Development\",\n+        Type = EnvironmentType.Development,\n+        BaseUrl = \"https://dev.api.local\",\n+        IsActive = true,\n+        CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-40),\n+        WorkspaceId = workspace.Id,\n+        Workspace = workspace\n+    };\n+\n+    var stagingEnv = new ApiEnvironment\n+    {\n+        Id = Guid.NewGuid(),\n+        Name = \"Staging\",\n+        Type = EnvironmentType.Staging,\n+        BaseUrl = \"https://staging.api.local\",\n+        IsActive = true,\n+        CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-35),\n+        WorkspaceId = workspace.Id,\n+        Workspace = workspace\n+    };\n+\n+    workspace.Environments.Add(devEnv);\n+    workspace.Environments.Add(stagingEnv);\n+\n+    devEnv.Variables.Add(new EnvironmentVariable\n+    {\n+        Id = Guid.NewGuid(),\n+        Environment = devEnv,\n+        EnvironmentId = devEnv.Id,\n+        Key = \"token\",\n+        Value = \"dev-token-123\",\n+        IsSecret = true,\n+        LastUpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-2)\n+    });\n+\n+    var tagAuth = new RequestTag\n+    {\n+        Id = Guid.NewGuid(),\n+        Name = \"Auth\",\n+        ColorHex = \"#2E7D32\",\n+        CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-20)\n+    };\n+\n+    var tagUsers = new RequestTag\n+    {\n+        Id = Guid.NewGuid(),\n+        Name = \"Users\",\n+        ColorHex = \"#1565C0\",\n+        CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-20)\n+    };\n+\n+    var collections = new List<ApiCollection>\n+    {\n+        new ApiCollection\n+        {\n+            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),\n+            Name = \"Auth API\",\n+            Description = \"Login and token refresh endpoints\",\n+            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-30),\n+            IsShared = true,\n+            WorkspaceId = workspace.Id,\n+            Workspace = workspace\n+        },\n+        new ApiCollection\n+        {\n+            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),\n+            Name = \"Users API\",\n+            Description = \"User management endpoints\",\n+            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-25),\n+            IsShared = true,\n+            WorkspaceId = workspace.Id,\n+            Workspace = workspace\n+        },\n+        new ApiCollection\n+        {\n+            Id = Guid.NewGuid(),\n+            Name = \"Orders API\",\n+            Description = \"Order processing endpoints\",\n+            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-15),\n+            IsShared = false,\n+            WorkspaceId = workspace.Id,\n+            Workspace = workspace\n+        }\n+    };\n+\n+    workspace.Collections.AddRange(collections);\n+\n+    AddRequest(collections[0], \"Login\", \"/auth/login\", HttpMethodType.Post, \"{\\\"email\\\":\\\"ana@apitester.dev\\\",\\\"password\\\":\\\"demo\\\"}\", tagAuth, devEnv, stagingEnv);\n+    AddRequest(collections[0], \"Refresh token\", \"/auth/refresh\", HttpMethodType.Post, \"{\\\"refreshToken\\\":\\\"abc\\\"}\", tagAuth, devEnv);\n+    AddRequest(collections[1], \"Get users\", \"/users\", HttpMethodType.Get, string.Empty, tagUsers, devEnv, stagingEnv);\n+    AddRequest(collections[1], \"Create user\", \"/users\", HttpMethodType.Post, \"{\\\"name\\\":\\\"Luka\\\"}\", tagUsers, devEnv);\n+    AddRequest(collections[2], \"Get order\", \"/orders/42\", HttpMethodType.Get, string.Empty, tagUsers, stagingEnv);\n+    AddRequest(collections[2], \"Delete order\", \"/orders/42\", HttpMethodType.Delete, string.Empty, tagUsers, stagingEnv);\n+\n+    var allRequests = collections.SelectMany(c => c.Requests).ToList();\n+    var executor = new ApiRequestExecutor();\n+\n+    await Task.WhenAll(allRequests.Select(r => executor.ExecuteRequestAsync(r)));\n+\n+    Console.WriteLine(\"=== LINQ QUERIES ===\");\n+\n+    var getRequests = allRequests\n+        .Where(r => r.Method == HttpMethodType.Get)\n+        .OrderBy(r => r.Name)\n+        .ToList();\n+    Console.WriteLine($\"GET requests: {getRequests.Count}\");\n+\n+    var latestExecutedRequest = allRequests\n+        .Where(r => r.LastExecutedAt.HasValue)\n+        .OrderByDescending(r => r.LastExecutedAt)\n+        .FirstOrDefault();\n+    Console.WriteLine($\"Latest executed request: {latestExecutedRequest?.Name}\");\n+\n+    var requestsPerCollection = collections\n+        .Select(c => new { c.Name, RequestCount = c.Requests.Count })\n+        .OrderByDescending(x => x.RequestCount)\n+        .ToList();\n+    foreach (var item in requestsPerCollection)\n+    {\n+        Console.WriteLine($\"Collection '{item.Name}' has {item.RequestCount} requests\");\n+    }\n+\n+    var failedResponses = allRequests\n+        .SelectMany(r => r.Responses)\n+        .Where(resp => !resp.IsSuccess)\n+        .OrderByDescending(resp => resp.ReceivedAt)\n+        .ToList();\n+    Console.WriteLine($\"Failed responses: {failedResponses.Count}\");\n+\n+    var requestsSortedByCreation = allRequests\n+        .OrderBy(r => r.CreatedAt)\n+        .Select(r => new { r.Name, r.CreatedAt })\n+        .ToList();\n+    Console.WriteLine(\"Requests sorted by creation date:\");\n+    foreach (var item in requestsSortedByCreation)\n+    {\n+        Console.WriteLine($\"- {item.Name} ({item.CreatedAt:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} UTC)\");\n+    }\n+\n+    var requestsLinkedToMultipleEnvironments = allRequests\n+        .Where(r => r.EnvironmentLinks.Count > 1)\n+        .Select(r => r.Name)\n+        .ToList();\n+    Console.WriteLine($\"Requests linked to multiple environments: {requestsLinkedToMultipleEnvironments.Count}\");\n+}\n+\n+static void AddRequest(\n+    ApiCollection collection,\n+    string name,\n+    string path,\n+    HttpMethodType method,\n+    string body,\n+    RequestTag tag,\n+    params ApiEnvironment[] environments)\n+{\n+    var request = new ApiRequest\n+    {\n+        Id = Guid.NewGuid(),\n+        Name = name,\n+        Url = path,\n+        Method = method,\n+        Body = body,\n+        CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-new Random().Next(1, 28)),\n+        CollectionId = collection.Id,\n+        Collection = collection\n+    };\n+\n+    request.Headers.Add(new ApiHeader\n+    {\n+        Id = Guid.NewGuid(),\n+        RequestId = request.Id,\n+        Request = request,\n+        Key = \"Accept\",\n+        Value = \"application/json\",\n+        IsEnabled = true\n+    });\n+\n+    foreach (var env in environments)\n+    {\n+        var envLink = new RequestEnvironmentLink\n+        {\n+            RequestId = request.Id,\n+            Request = request,\n+            EnvironmentId = env.Id,\n+            Environment = env,\n+            LinkedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,\n+            IsDefaultEnvironment = env.Type == EnvironmentType.Development\n+        };\n+\n+        request.EnvironmentLinks.Add(envLink);\n+        env.RequestLinks.Add(envLink);\n+    }\n+\n+    var tagLink = new RequestTagMap\n+    {\n+        RequestId = request.Id,\n+        Request = request,\n+        TagId = tag.Id,\n+        Tag = tag,\n+        LinkedAt = DateTime.UtcNow\n+    };\n+\n+    request.TagLinks.Add(tagLink);\n+    tag.RequestLinks.Add(tagLink);\n+\n+    collection.Requests.Add(request);\n+}\n*** End Patch"},"tool_use_id":"call_1AnPBl0Y77pc5J6YB82XjgCT__vscode-1775140531133","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Home\\Projects\\API-tester"}
